name: clawsec-analyst
description: AI-powered security analyst using Claude API for automated triage, risk assessment, and policy parsing
author: ClawSec Team

scripts.test: for f in test/*.test.mjs; do node "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:unit: for f in test/*.test.mjs; do [ "$f" != *integration* ] && node "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:integration: for f in test/integration-*.test.mjs; do node "$f" || exit 1; done
